title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF ODIONGAN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY SAN JOSE, CITY OF TANJAY, PROVINCE OF NEGROS ORIENTAL TO EGMIDIO V. MANZO MEMORIAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 4924 / 103 OG No. 37, 5825 (Sept. 10, 2007)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9455, May 15, 2007 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF ODIONGAN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY SAN JOSE, CITY OF TANJAY, PROVINCE OF NEGROS ORIENTAL TO EGMIDIO V. MANZO MEMORIAL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representative of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Renaming of Elementary School.

â The name of Odiongan Elementary School in Barangay San Jose, City of Tanjay, Province of Negros Oriental is hereby changed to Egmidio V. Manzo Memorial Elementary School.

SEC. 2.

Effectivity.

â This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the Official Gazette.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JOSE DE VENECIA JR.

(Sgd.) MANNY VILLAR

Speaker of the House of Representatives

President of the Senate

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on April 5, 2006 and February 19, 2007, respectively.

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P. NAZARENO

(Sgd.) OSCAR G. YABES

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Secretary of the Senate

Approved: MAY 15 2007

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL - ARROYO

President of the Philippines
